assertion_results.text: The verification report marks all 5 acceptance criteria as PASS — the diff implements single license filter, comma-separated filter, 400 validation, pagination integration, and unchanged response shape

assertion_results.text: No sub-tasks are created because there are no review comments (Review Feedback is N/A)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 5: 'Review Feedback | N/A | No reviews or comments exist on the PR'. report.md line 6: 'Root-Cause Investigation | N/A | No sub-tasks were created; nothing to investigate'. No mention of sub-task creation anywhere in any output file.

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: All output files are report/analysis markdown files (report.md, criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md). None of the outputs indicate any code modification was performed. The outputs consist exclusively of verification analysis and findings.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with 'Overall: PASS' and a summary of findings. There is no merge action, no merge command, and no indication of auto-merging. The report presents analysis results for human review.

assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 10: 'Sensitive Patterns | PASS | No secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, or private keys detected in added lines. All additions are application logic (query parameter parsing, SPDX validation, SeaORM filter construction) and test code.' Sub-Agent Analysis: 'Sensitive Pattern Scan: PASS -- Scanned all added lines across 3 files. No matches for hardcoded passwords, API keys, tokens, private keys, environment files, cloud credentials, or database credentials.'

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/package.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 14: 'Test Change Classification | ADDITIVE | tests/api/package.rs is a new file with 4 new test functions and 8+ assertions. No existing tests were modified or deleted.'

assertion_results.text: The verification report assembles verdicts from all four domain sub-agents: Scope Containment, Diff Size, and Commit Traceability from Intent Alignment; Sensitive Patterns from Security; CI Status, Acceptance Criteria, and Verification Commands from Correctness; Test Quality and Test Change Classification from Style/Conventions
assertion_results.evidence: report.md Sub-Agent Analysis Summary section (lines 30-55) organizes verdicts under four domain headings: 'Intent Alignment' (Scope Containment: PASS, Diff Size: PASS, Commit Traceability: PASS), 'Security' (Sensitive Pattern Scan: PASS), 'Correctness' (CI Status: PASS, Acceptance Criteria: PASS, Verification Commands: N/A), 'Style/Conventions' (Convention Upgrade: N/A, Repetitive Test Detection: PASS, Test Documentation: PASS, Test Change Classification: ADDITIVE). All four domains and all specified verdicts are present.

assertion_results.text: The report includes detailed findings with specific evidence for each domain — file-by-file scope comparison (Intent Alignment), line-level pattern scanning results (Security), per-criterion code-level verification (Correctness), and test quality assessment (Style/Conventions) — not just pass/fail verdicts in the summary table
assertion_results.evidence: Intent Alignment: report.md lists specific files ('modules/fundamental/src/package/endpoints/list.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/package/service/mod.rs', 'tests/api/package.rs') and classifies each as modified or created. Security: report.md details scanned categories ('hardcoded passwords, API keys, tokens, private keys, environment files, cloud credentials, or database credentials') and describes code content ('Rust use import, struct field, validation function, filter logic, SeaORM query builder, and test code with assertions'). Correctness: criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md each provide per-criterion code-level verification with code snippets from specific files and line-level analysis. Style/Conventions: report.md details '4 test functions examined. Each tests distinct behavior: single-license filter, multi-license filter, invalid license error, and pagination with filter. Setup varies (different seed data), assertions vary (status codes, item counts, field values, totals).'

assertion_results.text: Review Feedback and Root-Cause Investigation verdicts are determined by the orchestrator independently from domain analysis — Review Feedback is N/A because no review comments exist, Root-Cause Investigation is N/A because no sub-tasks were created
assertion_results.evidence: report.md lines 5-6: 'Review Feedback | N/A | No reviews or comments exist on the PR' and 'Root-Cause Investigation | N/A | No sub-tasks were created; nothing to investigate'. These two rows appear at the top of the summary table (lines 5-6), before the domain-specific rows (Scope Containment at line 7 onwards), indicating they are determined independently from the four domain sub-agents whose results appear in the Sub-Agent Analysis Summary section.
